overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval city at dusk. The character traverses from a gate entrance through a dark tunnel to a scenic overlook, then through narrow alleys to a waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval city square approaching stone gate

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the large stone gate entrance

notable_agents.action: standing near wooden cart wearing orange tunic

entered.detail: massive stone archway entrance with heavy wooden doors
wooden cart with large wheels parked on the street
tall medieval stone buildings with wooden accents

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a medieval city square toward a massive stone gate. The cobblestone street is lined with stone buildings and market carts, with a few NPCs scattered about. The dusk sky casts a warm orange glow over the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark covered tunnel passage through city gate

events.description: enters dark tunnel under the stone gate, visibility drops significantly
light becomes visible at the tunnel exit ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit tunnel passage

notable_agents.action: walking past in the opposite direction wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: dark rough stone walls of the covered passage

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark stone tunnel passing through the city gate. The lighting drops to near darkness with only faint ambient light, while occasional NPCs pass by in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated scenic walkway with panoramic city view

events.description: exits the dark tunnel onto an elevated walkway with bright sky and city view
character slows and stops briefly to look at the cityscape

agents.ego_description: walking along the overlook admiring the panoramic view of the city and distant towers

notable_agents.action: leaning on stone railing looking out at the city view

entered.detail: panoramic view of medieval city with towers and smoking chimneys against pink sky
ornate stone railing along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, the scene opens to a breathtaking panoramic view of the medieval city at dusk. The character walks along an elevated stone walkway with ornate railings, passing NPCs who are also admiring the distant towers and smoking chimneys against the pink sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval alleyways leading to waterfront overlook

events.description: turns left away from the scenic overlook into narrow back alleys
emerges from alley to open waterfront area with harbor view

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow cobblestone streets toward the waterfront

notable_agents.action: walking ahead wearing brown tunic and white cap
standing near building entrance observing the street

entered.detail: half-timbered wooden buildings with dark beams and plaster walls
suspended wooden shop sign hanging from chains
metal railing overlooking the harbor water

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the overlook into narrow medieval alleyways lined with half-timbered wooden buildings. Walking past various NPCs, the character emerges at a waterfront overlook with a hanging wooden sign visible overhead and a view of the harbor beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bustling city square through a dark passage and out toward a scenic harbor overlook at dusk. It begins by following the character across a cobblestone street lined with market carts and stone buildings under a warm orange glow. As the character enters a massive stone gate, the environment shifts abruptly into a dark tunnel with minimal ambient light before emerging onto an elevated stone walkway. The scene then opens into a breathtaking panoramic view of the city's towers and smoking chimneys against a pink sky, with the camera gliding past ornate railings. Finally, the view narrows as the character turns into tight alleyways of half-timbered wooden buildings, eventually emerging at a waterfront overlook beneath a hanging wooden sign.
